package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for http_status_ignored_before_decode: Response decoding or body consumption that happens without an observed StatusCode check.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: idioms; severity: info.
func scenario385Positive(url string) (*http.Response, error) {
	client := &http.Client{}
	return client.Get(url)
}
